project_name: Website Profil RT 037 RW 002 Desa X
design_concept: Heritage Modern & Warm Civic - A design that blends modern editorial layouts with subtle Indonesian cultural heritage (batik textures, earthy tones). It focuses on community warmth, trust, and clear communication without feeling like a generic corporate template.

typography.font_setup_instructions: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 400, 600, 700) and 'Manrope' (weights 400, 500, 600) from Google Fonts.

hierarchy.h1: font-serif text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight text-neutral-900 leading-tight
hierarchy.overline: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-primary-600

spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Avoid heavy drop shadows. Use 1px borders (border-border) with very subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm) to keep the aesthetic clean, flat, and editorial.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use the provided Batik pattern image as a very low opacity (3-5%) background wash on the Hero section and Footer to give a subtle Indonesian cultural context. Apply using CSS background-image with background-repeat and mix-blend-multiply.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Keep icon stroke-width to 1.5 for an elegant look.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D4A3E] text-white hover:bg-[#21382E] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors font-medium text-sm tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2D4A3E] border border-[#2D4A3E] hover:bg-[#2D4A3E]/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors font-medium text-sm tracking-wide

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E1D8] p-6 sm:p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

components.shadcn_overrides: When using Shadcn UI for forms (Input, Textarea, Select), override the default border radii to 'rounded-xl' and focus rings to use the primary green (#2D4A3E). Do not use the default Vercel-like aesthetics.

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.layout: Split editorial layout. Left side: Warm, welcoming typography (H1) and a primary CTA. Right side: Large featured image of the community, framed with rounded-3xl corners. Background includes the subtle batik texture wash.

pages_and_sections.name: Profil RT (Visi & Misi, Sejarah)
pages_and_sections.layout: Bento-style grid. A large span-2 card for Visi (Vision) using large serif typography. Smaller adjacent cards for Misi (Mission list) and a brief Sejarah (History) snippet. Generous internal padding (p-8 or p-10).

pages_and_sections.name: Statistik Warga
pages_and_sections.layout: 4-column grid displaying key metrics (Jumlah KK, Total Jiwa, Laki-laki, Perempuan). Big numbers in Serif font, subtle Lucide icons above each metric.

pages_and_sections.name: Struktur Pengurus
pages_and_sections.layout: Grid of profile cards. Each card contains a placeholder avatar (or empty state with initials), Name, and Role (Ketua RT, Sekretaris, etc.). Minimalist layout with center alignment inside the cards.

pages_and_sections.name: Galeri & Berita
pages_and_sections.layout: Masonry or asymmetrical grid showing local activities. Use the neighborhood activity images here. Hovering over images should slightly scale them up (group-hover:scale-105).

pages_and_sections.name: Kontak & Pengaduan Warga
pages_and_sections.layout: Two-column section. Left: Contact info, WhatsApp link, and physical address. Right: A Shadcn-based form for 'Saran & Pengaduan' (Name, Subject, Message).

pages_and_sections.name: Footer
pages_and_sections.layout: Deep green background (#2D4A3E) with off-white text. Batik texture overlay at 5% opacity. Contains quick links, copyright, and RT logo/text.

image_urls.description: A group of Indonesian people sitting and smiling, exuding a warm community vibe. Use for the main Hero section.
Traditional batik pattern. MUST be used as a CSS background-image with opacity around 3-5% (mix-blend-multiply) to add subtle cultural texture to the background of the Hero or Footer.
People on bicycles in a village setting. Use in the Galeri / Berita section.
Community parade/gathering. Use in the Galeri / Berita section to show active resident engagement.

accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, form inputs, and key sections MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').
accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: Ensure all focusable elements have an explicit focus state: 'focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2D4A3E] focus:ring-offset-2'.
accessibility_and_interactions.motion: Use Framer Motion for subtle fade-up entrance animations on scroll. Keep it professional; do not over-animate.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic purple or teal gradients. Strictly adhere to the organic, earthy color palette (Deep Greens, Warm Sands, Terracotta).
Use .js / .jsx files for React components, NOT .tsx.
Implement the 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts globally via Tailwind config and CSS imports.
Apply the Batik texture subtly. It should feel like a high-end watermark, not a distracting background. If unsure, apply it only to the Footer.
Ensure all sections have generous vertical spacing (py-24) to maintain the modern editorial look.
Use standard HTML tags structured with Tailwind for the complex asymmetrical layouts, and reserve Shadcn UI components for the interactive forms (Input, Textarea, Button).
Ensure the application is mobile-responsive out of the box.
